arts.ttl: What Brendan Rodgers told Kasper Schmeichel that made the decision to join Celtic 'easy'
arts.sum: However, Rodgers identified the big Dane as his man and Schmeichel signed for Celtic in July and he has not looked back since. “When a club the size of Celtic comes and wants you to play for them, the conversation can’t have been much more than five or ten minutes long.”

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers told 'the most important thing' Celtic must do to get a result vs Atalanta
arts.sum: The Celtic boss is adamant that he won’t ditch his attacking style in the Champions League and Massimo Donati has urged Rodgers to stick to his principles against Atalanta. Brendan Rodgers’ all-time European record with Celtic, Liverpool and Leicester City

arts.ttl: Champions League | Atalanta v Celtic: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Celtic aregearing up for a pivotal Champions League clash against Atalanta on Wednesday evening, aiming for a more favourable European away experience. After an impressive start to their league phase with a 5-1 victory over Slovan Bratislava, Brendan Rodgers’ team faced a harsh reality check, suffering a staggering 7-1 defeat to Borussia Dortmund in their last match. That game was characterized by relentless pressure from the home side, leaving Celtic looking to rebound. While Celtic remain a strong contender for domestic glory this season, they now face increased competition from Aberdeen, who managed to salvage a draw at Celtic Park The post Champions League | Atalanta v Celtic: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney gets Celtic dream deja vu as Arsenal injury curse strikes while forgotten £3.3m payday escalates
arts.sum: The defender has been tipped with a return to Celtic Park amid recurring injury woes

arts.ttl: 'Spicy…' Gabby Agbonlahor reacts to what he's hearing from Brendan Rodgers amid Rangers shock
arts.sum: But now, with Celtic focusing on Champions League matters, pre-match comments from Brendan Rodgers were discussed by Gabby Agbonlahor, as well as the difference between the two Glasgow clubs. Rodgers defended the noise around Celtic in the media, before talking about how Rangers are no longer winning every week like their neighbours are.

arts.ttl: 'Celtic need European ammunition to aim at sceptics'
arts.sum: Callum McGregor deserves to spearhead a resounding Celtic performance in Europe rather than another heavy loss, writes Tom English.

arts.ttl: Positivity for Celtic as Aston Villa and Club Brugge suffer mixed fortunes in Champions League
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Club Brugges were in Champions League action last night as both looked to get a positive result but for very different reasons. Villa’s last fixture in the Champions League is against Celtic and by that time they should be safely into the next round meaning by the time the Hoops visit the Premier League club they could field a weakened team giving Rodgers a better chance of securing a positive result in England.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers could dust off Leicester playbook in face of Celtic DNA claims
arts.sum: The attacking mantra was ditched during his time at the King Power Stadium, could he pull the trick off again?
